zh.lifeSummary: 當John Pettypoole於1577年5月26日出生在英國英格蘭艾可巴爾金時，他的父親Rycharde Puttyepoole57歲，母親Joane Boxer52歲。他於1600年1月16日與Elizabeth Strondall在英國艾可巴爾金結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1645年6月28日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年68歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可斯特普尼。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Pettypoole was born on 26 May 1577, in Barking, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Rycharde Puttyepoole, was 57 and his mother, Joane Boxer, was 52. He married Elizabeth Strondall on 16 January 1600, in Barking, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 28 June 1645, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Stepney, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Pettypoole est né le 26 mai 1577, à Barking, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rycharde Puttyepoole, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Joane Boxer, avait 52 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Strondall le 16 janvier 1600, à Barking, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 28 juin 1645, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: John Pettypooleが1577年5月26日にイギリスイギリスエセックスバーキングで生まれた時，父Rycharde Puttyepooleは57歳，母Joane Boxerは52歳であった。1600年1月16日にイギリスエセックスバーキングでElizabeth Strondallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1645年6月28日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで68歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスステプニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Pettypoole(이)가 1577년 5월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 바킨그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rycharde Puttyepoole(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Boxer(은)는 52세였다. 그는 1600년 1월 16일 영국 에세스 바킨그에서 Elizabeth Strondall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1645년 6월 28일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 스테p니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Pettypoole nasceu em 26 de maio de 1577, em Barking, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rycharde Puttyepoole, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Joane Boxer, tinha 52 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Strondall em 16 de janeiro de 1600, em Barking, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 28 de junho de 1645, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Pettypoole родился 26 мая 1577 г. в местности баркинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Rycharde Puttyepoole было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Boxer, 52. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Strondall 16 января 1600 г. в местности баркинг, эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 28 июня 1645 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности степни, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Pettypoole nació el 26 de mayo de 1577, en Barking, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Rycharde Puttyepoole, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Joane Boxer, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Strondall el 16 de enero de 1600, en Barking, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 28 de junio de 1645, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
